code: library(redeemR)  redeemv_final <- "/path/to/redeemV/final"  variants <- redeemR.read.trim(   path = redeemv_final,   thr = "S",   edge_trim = 9 )  obj <- Create_redeemR_model(   variants,   qualifiedCellCut = 10,   VAFcut = 1,   Cellcut = 2 )  obj <- clean_redeem(obj, fdr = 0.05, min_cell_per_variant = 2) obj <- add_annotation_redeem(obj) obj <- clean_redeem_remove_blacklist_RSRS50(obj) obj <- Add_DepthMatrix_filter2(obj) obj <- add_median_depth_to_redeemR(obj) obj <- clean_redeem_remove_low_median_depth(obj, min_median_depth = 5) obj <- add_prop_2_3_to_redeemR(obj)  saveRDS(obj, "sample1.S.redeemR_filter2_adddepth.rds") obj <- add_raw_fragment(obj, raw = "RawGenotypes.Sensitive.StrandBalance") qc <- run_redeem_qc(obj, obj@HomoVariants)

title: redeemR
text: Filter2 applies following sequence: Import REDEEM-V consensus variant calls final/. Annotate raw genotype calls distance nearest fragment end. Remove calls within edge-trimmed window. default threshold 9 bp. Reconstruct genotype summaries trimming, including per-cell variant UMI counts, site depth, heteroplasmy retained cell-variant record. Create initial redeemR object trimmed genotype summaries. Retain cells mean mitochondrial coverage >= 10. Initially retain candidate variants detected least two cells. Annotate homoplasmic near-homoplasmic variants using broad detection, high mean heteroplasmy, low variability. Build heteroplasmic cell--variant count binary matrices. Apply per-variant binomial goodness--fit test retain variants passing FDR <= 0.05. Annotate retained variants population, sequence-context, functional features. Remove heteroplasmic RSRS50 variants variants predefined mitochondrial blacklist regions downstream lineage analysis. Generate matched depth matrix QualifiedTotalCts. Add median-depth UMI-support metrics. Optionally remove variants median depth < 5 depth-corrected possible homoplasmic variants.

title: Create a redeemR object from raw variant summaries — Create_redeemR_model
text: VariantsGTSummary data.frame produced redeemR.read.trim(), attributes thr (threshold), depth (output DepthSummary()), (optionally) edge_trim, path, combined, suffix. qualifiedCellCut Numeric; minimum median mitochondrial coverage cell kept (default 10). VAFcut Numeric (0,1]; variants variant allele frequency <= VAFcut considered (default 1). Cellcut Integer >= 1; variants seen least Cellcut cells kept (default 2).

title: Create a redeemR object from raw variant summaries — Create_redeemR_model
text: object S4 class redeemR, slots GTsummary.ini, V.ini: unfiltered genotype & variant tables GTsummary.filtered, V.fitered: post-filter tables CellMeta, DepthSummary, HomoVariants, UniqueV, para, attr, ... count matrices @Cts.Mtx / @Cts.Mtx.bi populated.

text: Defines redeemR2.0 downstream framework processing REDEEM-V mitochondrial consensus variant calls lineage reconstruction. Introduces filter2 default post-consensus filtering workflow, replacing original filter1 strategy downstream analyses. Adds edge trimming raw genotype calls reduce residual fragment-end artifacts. Adds per-variant binomial goodness--fit filtering remove residual technical noise consensus calling. Adds annotation filtering utilities RSRS50, blacklist regions, population features, homopolymer context, hypermutable sites, amino-acid consequences, mitochondrial disease associations, transition/transversion class. Adds matched depth-matrix construction QualifiedTotalCts downstream lineage model workflows. Adds median-depth UMI-support metrics quality control. Adds filter2 QC summaries, including mutation spectra, transition/transversion ratios, depth distributions, variant-support plots, matrix-dimension logs.

title: redeemR 2.0.0
text: Reworked README around five core redeemR2.0 tasks: parsing REDEEM-V calls, post-consensus filtering/QC, edge trimming, binomial noise filtering, variant annotation/flagging. Added filter2 quickstart command-line R examples. Added canonical vignettes/redeemr-workflow.Rmd article REDEEM-V--filter2-object workflow. Added vignettes/filter2-qc.Rmd vignettes/variant-annotation.Rmd articles. Added _pkgdown.yml pkgdown documentation site workflow, QC, annotation, reference, changelog navigation.
